texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information, visit abp.io.
texts.Platform:Task:ViewPrivateDenied: You do not have permission to view this private task. Only the creator and assignee can view it.
texts.Platform:Task:ViewImpersonationDenied: You cannot view this private task while using impersonation.
texts.Platform:Task:UpdateDenied: You do not have permission to update this task. Only the creator or assignee can update it.
texts.Platform:Task:DeleteDenied: You do not have permission to delete this task. Only the creator or assignee can delete it.
texts.Platform:Project:NotFound: The requested project was not found.
texts.Platform:Project:CodeAlreadyExists: This project code is already in use.
texts.Platform:File:UnsupportedExtension: Unsupported file type. Only PDF, Office, image and archive files are allowed.
